name: G-12 validate-all: invalid file's rules are excluded from aggregation (files_excluded_from_aggregation reflects failed count) per §17 G-12
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules:
  - id: bad
    name: r
' > tree/google/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt; grep -q '"files_failed":1' err.txt && grep -q '"files_excluded_from_aggregation":1' err.txt && echo excluded 1>&2
